metadata.name: slthcore
metadata.summary: API generator based on yml file

modules.name: slth.cmd.init.boilerplate.backend.manage
documentation: Django's command-line utility for administrative tasks.

modules.name: slth.cmd.init.boilerplate.backend.api.wsgi
documentation:
WSGI config for app project.

It exposes the WSGI callable as a module-level variable named `application`.

For more information on this file, see
<https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/4.1/howto/deployment/wsgi/>

modules.name: slth.cmd.init.boilerplate.backend.api.asgi
documentation:
ASGI config for app project.

It exposes the ASGI callable as a module-level variable named `application`.

For more information on this file, see
<https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/4.1/howto/deployment/asgi/>
